description: This professional-grade 8-inch frying pan from Made In features a premium 5-ply construction for superior heat distribution. Handcrafted in Italy, this specific variant includes a stay-cool handle and a high-wall design optimized for searing and sauteing smaller portions. The 5-ply material consists of multiple layers of stainless steel and aluminum, ensuring no hot spots and excellent responsiveness. It is induction-compatible and oven-safe up to 430 degrees Celsius, making it a versatile tool for demanding UK commercial kitchens or serious home cooks seeking technical excellence.
features: 5-ply stainless clad construction (multiple layers of metal for even heating); Induction compatible base; Oven safe thermal resistance up to 430°C; 8-inch cooking diameter; Stay-cool handle design to minimise heat transfer.
uses: Searing proteins; frying eggs; sautéing small batches of vegetables; browning butter; finishing dishes in the oven.
name: Made In Stainless Clad Frying Pan, 8-Inch
